headline: Claude Cowork goes persistent, Perplexity gets your health data, & health AI becomes lowkey the next frontier

picks.name: Claude Cowork Projects
picks.tagline: Local AI agent workspace that actually remembers what you're working on
picks.summary: Anthropic shipped Projects for Claude Cowork on Mar 20—basically turns your agent work from one-off sessions into persistent workspaces tied to folders & recurring tasks. No more losing context between sessions.
picks.bestFor: Knowledge workers juggling multiple ongoing projects

picks.name: Perplexity Health
picks.tagline: Your scattered health data finally makes sense with AI that actually knows your medical history
picks.summary: Launched Mar 19 connecting Apple Health, EHRs from 1.7M providers & wearables to give you personalized health answers grounded in your actual data, not generic web results. Rolling out US-only to Pro/Max first.
picks.bestFor: Anyone who wants their AI to understand their actual health context

picks.name: Windsurf IDE
picks.tagline: The agentic code editor that actually feels like working with an AI teammate
picks.summary: Arena Mode lets you compare models side-by-side while coding, Plan Mode adds smarter task planning, & parallel multi-agent sessions mean you can run 5 projects at once without context bleeding everywhere.
picks.bestFor: Developers wanting to try different AI models on the same task

picks.name: Cursor Model Rebuild
picks.tagline: They quietly made their agent 86% cheaper without losing power
picks.summary: Cursor built their own model & lowkey crushed it on token efficiency—your agent context stays tighter, fewer tokens wasted, same output quality. This is the kind of optimization that actually moves the needle.
picks.bestFor: Devs tired of watching token counters explode

watchNext.title: Claude 4.6 Opus hits 75.6% SWE-Bench with 1M context window
watchNext.why: Basically the new benchmark king fr—1M context window means your whole codebase stays in scope, 128K output lets it write entire features at once. This is what state-of-the-art actually looks like.

watchNext.title: Cursor built its own model for 86% less cost - The Neuron
watchNext.why: 🎙️ The Neuron broke down how Cursor optimized their agent's token usage without sacrificing performance. If you're shipping agents, this is required watching.
